settings.label: Image
settings.info: Will be scaled down to 32 x 32px

settings.label: Meta Description Homepage
settings.default: December Shopify Template with multiple layouts and styles allows you to create different structures and satisfies any specific requirements for different kinds of business.
settings.info: A meta description is an element in the HTML code of a web page that provides a brief description of the content of that page.

settings.label: Primary Color
settings.info: Button Background Hover, Link Hover, Button Outline Hover

settings.label: Drawer Background
settings.info: This changes the background of your cart and search drawer

settings.label: Chrome Background
settings.info: Drawers, dropdowns, quantity inputs, card overlays. Empty = classic white.

settings.label: Chrome Text
settings.info: Text/icons on chrome surfaces. Empty = classic black.

settings.label: Chrome Border
settings.info: Borders/dividers on chrome surfaces. Empty = classic light grey.

settings.label: Slideshow White Text
settings.info: When enabled, the review box text color changes to white for better readability on dark slideshows.

definition.label: Accent Color
definition.info: Border color, radio button color, price color and hover on unselected bundles

settings.label: Enable Font 2 Body
settings.info: If disable Font 2 body, Font body is Custom Font Main

settings.content: 💡 Set blank to use Shopify font
💡 Set blank to use Shopify font

settings.label: Image
settings.info: Shown when sharing a link on social media. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/manual/using-themes/troubleshooting/showing-social-media-thumbnail-images/) about image thumbnails.

settings.label: Wishlist Page
settings.info: [Create new page](/admin/pages/new) and select template suffix is page.wishlist

settings.label: Number Of Days For Which The Product Is Considered 'New'
Configuration
settings.info: Each rule must be in its own line. [Learn more](https://shopifytemplate.gitbook.io/december-os2.0/global-settings/custom-color-filter)

settings.label: Image Ratio
settings.info: Image format inside the Quick View popup. The popup adapts to this ratio.

settings.label: Enable Coupon Code
settings.info: Coupon Code will auto add in Checkout Page

settings.label: Minimum Order Value To Be Free Shipping
Show Discount Information
settings.info: Discount information will be visible if one of the product in cart has discount

settings.label: Discount Information Bar Text
settings.info: Use curly bracket for the discount value indicator eg: {DISCOUNT}

settings.label: Show Badges In Product
settings.info: Badges information will be visible if one of the product in cart has discount

settings.label: Show Badge On Total Price
settings.info: Badges information will be visible if cart has discount

settings.label: Background Gradient
settings.info: You need to activate the checkbox above to see the changes

settings.label: Show Timer Countdown
settings.info: Show timer countdown will be visible if one of the product in cart has discount

settings.label: Show Timer Countdown
settings.default: We can reserve your order for [time] minutes

settings.content: ⏱ Countdown timing (date / duration / action) is configured globally in Theme Settings → Sale Countdown — shared with the Top Bar, Count Down section and product Promo Sale. Only the title and box colours above are cart-specific.

Store-wide countdown timing. Sections set to 'Global' (Top Bar, Count Down section, Product Promo Sale) all read these values, so they stay in sync. Switch a section to 'Custom' to override it locally.

settings.label: Evergreen (rolling per visitor)
settings.info: Each visitor gets a fresh window counting down from the duration below, instead of a fixed end date.
